scripts.local:link: (cd packages/core && bun link) && (cd packages/vue && bun link) && (cd packages/registry && bun link) && (cd packages/cli && bun link)
scripts.local:unlink: (cd packages/core && bun unlink) && (cd packages/vue && bun unlink) && (cd packages/registry && bun unlink) && (cd packages/cli && bun unlink)
scripts.local:link:build: turbo run build && (cd packages/core && bun link) && (cd packages/vue && bun link) && (cd packages/registry && bun link) && (cd packages/cli && bun link)
